title: [FIRRTL] Add Probes to Exporter
body:
The FIRRTL exporter does not currently implement `probe` and associated reference type operations. Add support for these and make sure they round-trip correctly.

Consider the following:

```
circuit Foo:
  module Foo:
    output a: Probe<UInt<1>>
    output b: RWProbe<UInt<1>>

    wire x: UInt<1>

    define a = probe(x)
    define b = rwprobe(x)
```

This currently hits an unreachable condition if you try to export it:

```
# firtool Bar.fir -parse-only | circt-translate -export-firrtl
circuit Foo :
  module Foo :
    output a : all types should be implemented
UNREACHABLE executed at /Users/schuylere/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Export/FIREmitter.cpp:787!
```
